id.description: Unique identifier for the ticket event

ticket_id.description: The ID of the ticket associated with this event

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp of when the event was created

created_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the event was created

updater_id.description: The ID of the user or system that triggered the event

via.description: How the event was initiated (e.g., web, API, rule)

via_reference_id.description: Reference ID for the via channel

child_events.description: List of child events associated with this ticket event

event_type.description: The type of the ticket event
